title: pastinaca hirsuta
intro: Pastinaca hirsuta, also known as hairy parsnip, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its roots and seeds, which have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, and to reduce inflammation and pain. The health benefits of pastinaca hirsuta include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic and diuretic. Herbal preparations of pastinaca hirsuta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
